title: Reliance Industries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Reliance Industries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Industries is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Reliance Industries:
Reliance Industries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Industries!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
